channel.title: Sailsjs on Make Things Happen
channel.description: Recent content in Sailsjs on Make Things Happen

item.title: Simple role management for SailsJS
item.description: You have probably heard this form me. I am working on a Sails js project and I wanted to implement a simple role management. That means that I have several routes like: “/admin”, “/login”, “/users” and I want the admin route  to be accessed only from admins, login to be accessed from admin and users and the users route to be accessed from only the users.

item.title: How to add Joi params, query, body validation to Sails JS?
item.description: Let’s keep the things short. I am working on a SailsJS app and I am missing a lot the HapiJS Joi validation features. It keeps the validation logic separate and isolated from the controllers and other stuff. So I was wondering how to integrate Joi with Sails.
